retrospective_historical_replay_964.description: Out-of-sample historical replay evaluation across 22 FIFA World Cup tournaments (1930-2022)
retrospective_historical_replay_964.note: Historical 964-match replay benchmark under strict A v4 quarantined core model.

prospective_2026_online.description: Prospective online live service predictions for 2026 matches (awaiting live ledger export)
prospective_2026_online.note: No verified 2026 online ledger export provided; prospective metrics are marked unverified/null.

governance_separation_rule: Prospective online metrics must be computed dynamically from verified ledger exports and never hardcoded. Retrospective replay metrics apply strictly to the 964-match historical dataset. The two must never be mixed or conflated.
